title: Digger
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Digger |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}}{{InsiderCite|65|The Pengalan Tradeoff}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|There's something you ought to know.''"
"''What's that?''"
"''We're not regulars. My platoon. We were made to be, how'd they put it, a little more self-reliant than the others. To be capable of more initiative. There are some more out there like us. In case they need troopers for more specialized missions.|Digger and Joram Kithe|}} '''Digger''' was an [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] and one of a group of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] left behind on [[Pengalan IV]] after their [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] was shot down during a full scale [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Battle of Pengalan IV|retreat]]. Abandoned with his fellow troopers and a Republic accountant named [[Joram Kithe]], they were on their own to figure out how to get off the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. When Kithe awoke and revealed that he had been commissioned as a [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], Digger was the first trooper to speak to him. Kithe was disturbed by the troopers' reliance on proper procedure, and tried to foster individuality in them. To that end, he gave the troopers nicknames. Digger gained his nickname because he was digging graves for the gunship's dead the first time Kithe spoke to him. After making their way to [[Tur Lorkin]], the nearest village, and infiltrating a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] bay, [[Tooth (clone)|Tooth]] and Kithe realized that the village was in fact the site of the [[diamond boron missile]] manufacturing facility, not the factory which had been the site of the earlier trap. Determined to destroy it, Tooth faced Kithe and was willing to defy the man's orders to complete his mission. Impressed, Kithe relented. The troopers sabotaged the factory with Kithe's aid while Tooth stole a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] ship to draw the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] away from the starship bay, allowing Joram and the remaining troopers to escape. Digger was in [[Comm unit/Legends|comm]] contact with him, and heard Tooth go down. Digger took a leading role in the assault on the factory, shielding captured missiles with his body and frequently taking point and making decisions with Kithe. He survived the mission, and would continue to serve with the other survivors.{{InsiderCite|73|The League of Spies}} ==Appearances== *{{InsiderCite|65|The Pengalan Tradeoff|reprint=1}} {{1st}} *{{InsiderCite|73|The League of Spies|reprint=1}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Digger }} [[Category:Advanced Recon Commandos]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
